name: academorix/search
purpose: Enterprise search — wraps laravel/scout with attribute-driven registration, pluggable engine adapters, unified query API, and zero-downtime alias-swap reindex.
capabilities: SearchIndex + SearchSyncJob + SearchSynonym + SearchSavedQuery + SearchAnalyticsEvent aggregates
Engines: Meilisearch, Postgres FTS, pgvector, Elasticsearch stub
when_to_use: The app needs full-text or semantic search across one or more models with per-tenant synonyms and analytics.
when_not_to_use: For simple exact-match filtering on a single model, spatie/laravel-query-builder on academorix/foundation suffices.
